query:
SELECT a.id, a.nomeOriginal, a.tipo, a.direcao, a.status, a.createdAt, c.nome as convenio, e.nome as estabelecimento 
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON a.estabelecimentoId = e.id 
WHERE c.nome LIKE '%CASSI%' OR c.nome LIKE '%cassi%' OR a.nomeOriginal LIKE '%cassi%' OR a.nomeOriginal LIKE '%CASSI%'
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 20

WHERE c.nome LIKE '%CASSI%' OR c.nome LIKE '%cassi%' OR a.nomeOriginal LIKE '%cassi%' OR a.nomeOriginal LIKE '%CASSI%'
